prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic 3D digital poster of a stylish young male AI creator in a futuristic dark studio, seated in a relaxed confident pose at the center. The subject wears a sleek black hoodie with a small X emblem on the chest, a black bucket hat with an X logo, modern glasses partially hidden by shadow, beige cargo jogger pants, a black wristwatch, black socks with X marks, and custom black high-top sneakers with white laces, white soles, and glowing cyan X accents. Keep the face softly obscured or shadowed while preserving a premium fashion-poster look. Behind him, place one huge metallic 3D glowing X logo with cyan neon edge lighting, forming the main backdrop. The environment is glossy black, reflective, and cyberpunk, with floating holographic UI panels, digital scan lines, tiny particles, cyan circuitry, and reflections on the wet floor. Include exactly 6 floating graphic elements: 1 left stats panel showing “28.5K LIKES”, “12.1K REPOSTS”, and “8.7M IMPRESSIONS” with heart, repost, and eye icons; 1 right strategy panel listing “GO VIRAL / MAXIMIZE REACH”, “BUILD INFLUENCE / GROW YOUR BRAND”, and “TREND THE WORLD / LEAD THE FUTURE” with rocket, people, and globe icons; 1 small lower-left analytics card reading “TRENDING TOP 1% CREATOR” with an upward bar chart; 1 standalone X logo on the lower left; 1 glowing heart outline on the lower right; and 1 upward arrow/share icon near the lower right. At the bottom, add a large cyan neon handwritten signature reading Mr Tariq, with smaller white spaced text below reading AI CREATOR. Use a dramatic low-angle composition, high contrast black-and-cyan palette, volumetric rim lighting, sharp glossy 3D rendering, realistic fabric folds, premium sneaker detail, shallow depth of field, and a vertical poster aspect ratio. Do not add extra panels, extra people, watermarks, or unrelated text.
